videos.title: birkebeiner 2015 wave 9 classic gets started
videos.description: here we go: the newbies, planning to do the birkebeiner or the kortelopet, classic style, full of jitters and cold toes, skiing off to the woods to get this thing started. that's me in the purple, and that's david in the pink socks. yep.
